category_sources: source_facts.description says it merges httpd logs; official SourceForge homepage describes mergelog as a C program merging Common Log Format files from round-robin web servers.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge homepage title uses “MergeLog”; source_facts.name is mergelog.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge homepage is the best available documentation surface and includes description, license, and current stable version.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page provides release tarballs but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge homepage describes merging httpd Common Log Format logs and distribution with zmergelog; source_facts.executables lists mergelog and zmergelog.
